The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

C:\\Users\\Public\\OneDrive\\سطح المكتب\.serviceRawFile:
# "org" ensures this Service is used with the correct Serverless Framework Access Key.
org: duhaaa
service: poll-voting-Duha

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  region: us-east-1
  environment:
    EMAIL_USER: Duhaneesr@gmail.com
    EMAIL_PASS: "pueb buxz zftc xzyk"


  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:UpdateItem
            - dynamodb:Query
            - dynamodb:Scan
          Resource: "arn:aws:dynamodb:us-east-1:*:table/PollsTable_Duha"
functions:
  createPoll:
    handler: createPoll.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /polls
          method: post
          cors: true

  getPoll:
    handler: getPoll.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /polls/{pollId}
          method: get
          cors: true

  submitVote:
    handler: submitVote.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /polls/{pollId}/vote
          method: post
          cors: true

  sendResults:
    handler: sendResults.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /polls/{pollId}/send
          method: post
          cors: true

resources:
  Resources:
    PollsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: PollsTable_Duha
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: pollId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: pollId
            KeyType: HASH
